Class DatabaseHelper

java.lang.Object
databasePart1.DatabaseHelper
public class DatabaseHelper extends Object
The DatabaseHelper class is responsible for managing the connection to the database, performing operations such as user registration, login validation, and handling invitation codes. NOTE: Rating-related tables and methods were removed per request (only reviews themselves are stored).

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors

    Description

      Insert a Review (no rating column). Upon success, the generated review_id is set into the Review object (if Review has a setter).
      Throws:
      SQLException

      Creates the notifications table if it doesn't exist.
      Throws:
      SQLException

      public void createNotificationIndexes() throws SQLException
      Creates indexes for better notification query performance.
      Throws:
      SQLException

    • insertNotification

      public boolean insertNotification(Notification notification)
      Insert a new notification into the database.
      Parameters:
      notification - The notification to insert
      Returns:
      true if successful, false otherwise

    • getUnreadNotifications

      public List<Notification> getUnreadNotifications(int userId) throws SQLException
      Get all unread notifications for a specific user.
      Parameters:
      userId - The user's ID
      Returns:
      List of unread notifications
      Throws:
      SQLException - if database error occurs

    • getAllNotifications

      public List<Notification> getAllNotifications(int userId) throws SQLException
      Get all notifications for a user (unread first, then most recent).
      Parameters:
      userId - recipient user id
      Returns:
      list of notifications (empty on error)
      Throws:
      SQLException - if needed (this version logs and returns empty list on error)

    • markNotificationAsRead

      public boolean markNotificationAsRead(int notificationId) throws SQLException
      Mark a notification read.
      Parameters:
      notificationId - the notification id
      Returns:
      true if successful
      Throws:
      SQLException - if database error occurs

    • markAllNotificationsAsRead

      public int markAllNotificationsAsRead(int userId) throws SQLException
      Mark all notifications as read for a user.
      Parameters:
      userId - the user id
      Returns:
      number of notifications updated
      Throws:
      SQLException - if database error occurs

    • getUnreadNotificationCount

      public int getUnreadNotificationCount(int userId) throws SQLException
      Get unread notification count for a user.
      Parameters:
      userId - recipient user id
      Returns:
      number of unread notifications
      Throws:
      SQLException - if database error occurs

    • deleteNotification

      public boolean deleteNotification(int notificationId) throws SQLException
      Delete a notification by ID.
      Parameters:
      notificationId - the notification id to delete
      Returns:
      true if successful
      Throws:
      SQLException - if database error occurs
